scripts.lint:docs:check: npm run lint:docs:markdown && npm run lint:docs:html && npm run format:docs:check
scripts.lint:docs:fix: npm run lint:docs:markdown:fix && npm run lint:docs:html && npm run format:docs
scripts.lint:preview:check: npm run lint:preview:eslint && npm run lint:preview:biome && npm run format:preview:check
scripts.lint:preview:fix: npm run lint:preview:eslint:fix && npm run lint:preview:biome:fix && npm run format:preview
scripts.lint:portal:check: npm run lint:portal:eslint && npm run lint:portal:biome && npm run format:portal:check
scripts.lint:portal:fix: npm run lint:portal:eslint:fix && npm run lint:portal:biome:fix && npm run format:portal
scripts.format:preview: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.preview.json tsconfig.portal.json vite.portal.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore README.md "docs/**/*.md" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/preview/preview_ui/*.html"
scripts.format:portal: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.portal.json vite.portal.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore "internal/portal/portal_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/portal/portal_ui/*.html"
scripts.format:preview:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.preview.json tsconfig.portal.json vite.portal.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore README.md "docs/**/*.md" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/preview/preview_ui/*.html"
scripts.format:portal:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.portal.json vite.portal.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore "internal/portal/portal_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/portal/portal_ui/*.html"
